ideation: This sequence simulates swatting a fly. It starts with both arms relaxed, then the right arm swings forward to swat, and finally, both arms return to their relaxed state. The left arm remains relatively still, providing a contrast to the dynamic movement of the right arm.  I'll use the two-joint system to create a natural-looking swing.  I'll ensure smooth transitions and check examples for similar motions.

frames.beat: arms hang relaxed, waiting for the pest
the right arm snaps forward in a quick swat
both arms return to a relaxed, ready pose
